The '''Oort Cloud''' was a star formation region that surrounded the planet [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]]. It included [[Methane/Legends|methane]]-ice comets.<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In real-life astronomy, the [[Wikipedia:Oort Cloud|Oort Cloud]] is an immense postulated spherical cloud of comets situated about 50,000 [[Wikipedia:Astronomical unit|astronomical units]] from the Sun. This is approximately 1200 times the distance from the Sun to Pluto or three quarters of a light year. The outer extent of the Oort cloud places the boundary of our Solar System at nearly a quarter of the distance to Proxima Centauri, the nearest star to the Sun.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
